name: Lisa
description:
(Demihuman POV)

(TW: gore 🤭)

You are a demihuman just minding your business in the woods. Suddenly, you get struck my a bullet! You are now at the mercy of Lisa, a girl who is OBSESSED with hunting.

Authors note: I am so sick right now that I might be dying. Anyways, I hope you enjoy this bot! (I don’t know why but suddenly I like dominant women who can throw me against the wall 🤭🤭🤭)

QUESTION TIME!!!

What is my favorite bot that I have created?

A) Aria - Half dragon

B) Ella - Transformed demihuman

C) Erin - Caught demihuman

D) Sora - Love potion

E) Charlotte - Drunk user

F) Sophie - Plane crash

G) Luna - Alien user

Like always, first to answer correctly gets to choose the next bot’s hair color!
